title: Bucketable
description: Put any mob into a bucket! Completely customizable!
body:
**NOTICE: If you are using the data pack version of Bucketable, the Download button at the top of the page WILL NOT download the required resource pack automatically! You must find the resource pack at the bottom of [this page](https://modrinth.com/datapack/bucketable/version/3.3).**

### Bucketable allows you to bucket any mob you want! Whether it's as simple as scooping up your pet frog, or as ridiculous as entrapping an entire Ender Dragon in a tiny metal prison, you can do it all!

Still not getting it? Check out the video showcase below!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/n4EHP9UOjN4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## Tutorial
To bucket a mob, simply hold a water bucket, look at it, and right click! Any mob that has some other function when right clicked (ie; villagers, camels, allays) require you to sneak while right clicking to bucket them. Then right click anywhere on the ground to empty the bucket out!

## Commands
Bucketable comes with several presets that only enable bucketing specific groups of mobs, as well as the ability to completely customize exactly which mobs you want to be bucketable.

_Enables all mobs:_  
```/function bucketable:presets/all```

_Disables all mobs:_  
```/function bucketable:presets/none```

_Enables friendly water mobs:_  
```/function bucketable:presets/water_mobs_less```

_Enables all water mobs:_  
```/function bucketable:presets/water_mobs_more```

_Enables small mobs:_  
```/function bucketable:presets/small_mobs```

_Add a specific mob:_  
```/function bucketable:add/[MOB_ID]```

_Remove a specific mob:_  
```/function bucketable:remove/[MOB_ID]```

_See all enabled mobs:_  
```/function bucketable:list_enabled```

_In-game help menu:_  
```/function bucketable:help```

## Known Bugs
Should you come across any other bugs, please report them in my Discord, linked on the right. I'll do my best to fix any known bugs, as long as it's actually possible.
- Tamed cats are not easily bucketed, due to an advancement bug [(MC-254899)](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-254899). To bucket a tamed cat, you must be out of interaction distance, hold right click and sneak, and slowly approach them.

## Known Incompatibilities
- [Upgraded Mobs](https://modrinth.com/datapack/upgraded-mobs)
